Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing

Class AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.slicing.AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo
Enclosing class:
AbstractSlicer
protected static class AbstractSlicer.SequentInfo extends Object
The result returned by AbstractSlicer.analyzeSequent(de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.Node, org.key_project.util.collection.ImmutableList<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.ISymbolicEquivalenceClass>).
